    Bhaskar Bhaumik

    AI Innovation Leader at TCS. Builder of AI Rapid Build Camps. Enterprise Data & Analytics Architect.

    What I Build

    Reusable accelerators, reference architectures, and rapid-delivery systems that help enterprises move from AI ambition to production outcomes — fast.

    Composable Agentic AI Platform

    Logical and technical reference architecture for enterprise-grade Agentic AI across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

    Enterprise Data Lakehouse on GCP

    Modern data lakehouse platform architecture migrating on-prem EDW to Google Cloud at retail scale.

    Enterprise D&A Center of Excellence

    Operating model, team structure, and delivery framework for a high-performing Data & Analytics COE.

    AI Rapid Build Camps

    Structured innovation sprints that deliver production-ready AI MVPs in weeks, with playbooks and reusable codebases.
